title: Wowcher 'extremely sorry' for crocodile attack email
description: The firm's marketing email appeared to reference an incident involving a toddler at a zoo.
content:
Discount website Wowcher has apologised after a marketing email appeared to reference a crocodile attack on a toddler at a zoo.

title: Starmer expected to announce exit plan to clear way for Burnham to become PM
description: Ministers say Starmer will set out his intentions on Monday morning with an autumn departure the most likely option
content:
Keir Starmer is expected to announce a timetable for his departure on Monday morning, clearing the way for Andy Burnham to become prime minister without a formal contest by the autumn.

title: Serena Williams to make singles return at Wimbledon after accepting wild card
description: Serena Williams, 44, will launch the singles portion of her comeback at Wimbledon after the tournament announced Sunday that she had accepted its final wild card. It will mark her first singles match since the 2022 US Open.
content:
Serena Williams, 44, will officially return to singles competition after accepting the final Wimbledon ladies' singles wild card, the tournament announced Sunday on social media.

description:

content:

title: Serena Williams: American 23-time Grand Slam winner receives Wimbledon women's singles wild card
description: Serena Williams, 44, won 23 Grand Slam singles titles - including seven at Wimbledon - before stepping away from the game; the American will make her Grand Slam return; watch the ATP and WTA Tours live on Sky Sports Tennis and Sky Sports+, NOW and the Sky Sports app
content:
Serena Williams has been handed the final Wimbledon singles wild card into the women's main draw as she prepares for her Grand Slam comeback.
